"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a clear understanding of the sources of fake content, such as bots, hackers, and competitors. It is also essential to have a good cybersecurity system in place to detect and block any suspicious activity. Additionally, users should be cautious when sharing information online and verify the authenticity of the sources before doing so. Furthermore, social media platforms should take responsibility for monitoring their platforms and removing fake content to maintain user trust."

response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a clear understanding of the sources of fake content, such as bots, hackers, and competitors. It is also essential to have a good cybersecurity system in place to detect and block any suspicious activity. Additionally, users should be cautious when sharing information online and verify the authenticity of the sources before doing so. Furthermore, social media platforms should take responsibility for monitoring their platforms and removing fake content to maintain user trust.

It is also essential to have a good cybersecurity system in place to detect and block any suspicious activity.
